all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the Egyptians shall know that I am the Lord, when I stretch forth mine hand upon Egypt, and bring out the children of Israel from among them.
Exodus 7:5
Quote of the Day
"As we dedicate time daily to come closer to Christ, our hearts are changed."
Elder Ronald M. Barcellos | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
